title: rosa viscaria var. rothomagensis
intro: Rosa viscaria var. rothomagensis, also known as the viscaria or viscid rose, is a variety of rose plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It is a fragrant, pink-flowering shrub with medicinal properties attributed to its leaves and flowers. The plant's leaves and flowers have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Rosa viscaria var. rothomagensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture for its health benefits, which include soothing digestive issues, reducing pain and inflammation, and promoting overall well-being.
